title: Mildly Roasted Venezuelan Sweet Potato Roast
description: A floral and light Venezuelan dish featuring roasted sweet potatoes and chocolate chips, perfect for a vegetarian meal prep option. This recipe combines the natural sweetness of sweet potatoes with the richness of chocolate.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sweet potatoes with olive oil, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and paprika until they are evenly coated.
Spread the sweet potatoes in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
Remove the sweet potatoes from the oven and stir in the dark chocolate chips.
Return the sweet potatoes to the oven and continue roasting for an additional 10 minutes, or until they are tender and the chocolate is melted.
Remove the sweet potatoes from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh cilantro.
Let the sweet potatoes cool slightly before serving.
Serve the sweet potatoes hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
